评价刚出，后面会涨！请放心阅读！
本书又名：我这么自律，凭什么跑不赢博尔特？
又名：苏炳天是我师弟，我轻松跑进十秒很正常吧？
又名：女人只会影响我跑步速度，谁都无法阻止我，我说的！
开局和苏神同乡兼师兄弟关系是什么体验?
一个同样有着田径梦想的苏浩，不过因为前世早早因为一场意外而丧失跑步能力只能坐轮椅的苏浩重生在这个同名同姓的人身上，结果醒来就看到苏神竟叫自己师兄？
不仅如此，自己竟然开局就面临被劝退的风险。
然而就在这时脑海中忽的传来系统提示音
【恭喜宿主完成强者之心新手任务，当前职业短跑运动员】
【职业主线任务】：参加第一场正式比赛，并获得下一项技能。
【支线任务】：挑战当前或者未来奥运冠军并获得胜利，奖励随机抽取一项对方技能。
【进阶任务】：检测到宿主当前专攻百米赛道，须宿主完成一次百米正式比赛冠军可解锁。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/163f6603e2143c5759b96423a0b0a113","author":"动物园头牌","author_id":"","book_id":"7591128784556805182","book_name":"开局体校劝退，我反手百米称王","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"20.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":15,"name":"体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=15&name=体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":830,"name":"升级流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=830&name=升级流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7591128980304953918","read_count":"208076","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"468541"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.4","serial_count":"195","tags":"游戏体育,体育,系统,重生,升级流","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/910e1614fa2bcedafc54d1dcec180c11~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779362111&x-signature=pNoACKZZqpladHs7z0%2FlbfQ4xyI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1139509052313416","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"159"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221915110BFF037D472DAA59AD1A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读10小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":34608,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":49},"user_action":{"au
